hero.label: Mozambique's First Private Airport Operator
hero.description: AeroPalma is Mozambique's first private airport operator — delivering world-class airport management, maintenance, and aviation security services to the LNG energy sector at Afungi Airport.

clients.label: Trusted By
clients.tagline: Serving the LNG energy sector at Afungi Airport

services.title: Four pillars of
services.subtitle: Every service we deliver is built on years of operational experience and an unwavering commitment to safety, aligned with IACM and ICAO standards.

items.title: Airport Management
items.description: As Mozambique's first private airport operator, AeroPalma delivers comprehensive airport management for Afungi Airport — the strategic gateway to Mozambique's LNG sector. We manage day-to-day operations, regulatory compliance, and continuous service improvement.

items.title: Airport Maintenance
items.description: Specialized maintenance of airport infrastructure, equipment, and systems. From runway lighting and terminal facilities to critical hydrant fueling systems — we keep Afungi Airport in peak operational condition, minimizing downtime for energy sector clients.

items.title: Aviation Security Services
items.description: Comprehensive airside security operations ensuring full regulatory compliance with IACM and ICAO standards. Our trained personnel deliver perimeter control, passenger screening, access management, and threat assessment to the highest international standards.

items.title: Airport Ground Handling
items.description: End-to-end ramp and ground support for commercial and private aircraft serving the LNG sector. From marshalling and baggage handling to aircraft towing and cabin servicing — precise, safe, and on schedule.

about.title: Mozambique's first private
about.body1: AeroPalma is a proudly Mozambican company and the country's first private airport operator — operating at Afungi Airport, the strategic gateway to Mozambique's LNG sector, serving TotalEnergies and ExxonMobil with local expertise and international standards.
about.body2: From airport management and security to ground handling and infrastructure maintenance — our teams operate with precision 24/7, because in aviation, reliability is non-negotiable. We are fully aligned with IACM and ICAO standards.

partners.title: Built on trusted
partners.subtitle: AeroPalma operates within a network of key institutional partners and regulatory bodies that ensure the highest standards of safety and service.

list.name: EDM — Air Navigation Services
list.desc: Ensuring safe and efficient air traffic management at Afungi Airport.

list.name: INAM — Aeronautical Meteorological Services
list.desc: Providing accurate meteorological data critical for flight safety operations.

list.name: Petromoc — Fuel Services Partner
list.desc: Reliable aviation fuel supply supporting uninterrupted flight operations.

list.name: IACM — Instituto de Aviação Civil de Moçambique
list.desc: The national civil aviation authority governing all operations at Mozambican airports.

list.name: ICAO — International Civil Aviation Organization
list.desc: The global regulatory framework guiding our operational and safety standards.

contact.title: Ready to elevate your
contact.description: Contact our team to discuss how AeroPalma can support your aviation and LNG energy operations at Afungi Airport.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your operational requirements…
contact.successBody: WhatsApp has been opened. We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.tagline: Mozambique's first private airport operator at Afungi Airport.
